memoryArtifacts.headline: Le Blount Family, in Letitia S. La Roche, North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America, Application for Membership, 20 April 1900, Page 7
memoryArtifacts.description:
In 1900, Letitia S. LaRoche (nee Letitia Gamble Shepard) applied for membership in the North Carolina Society of Colonial Dames of America.

This is an excerpt from an 8 page "Application for Membership of Mrs. Letitia S. La Roche, Dated April 20, 1900, Elected June 6, 1900."

It is probably not all accurate.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham於大約1197年出生在英國素福爾可易沃斯時，他的父親Stephen le Blount32歲，母親Maria Blount28歲。他於大約1220年與Cecilia Levet在英國英格蘭諾福爾可薩可林加姆結婚。他去世於大約1288年在英國盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德享年93歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham于大约1197年出生在英国素福爾可易沃斯时，他的父亲Stephen le Blount32岁，母亲Maria Blount28岁。他于大约1220年与Cecilia Levet在英国英格兰諾福爾可薩可林加姆结婚。他去世于大约1288年在英国盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德享年93岁，埋葬在英国英格兰盧特藍德貝爾頓 在 盧特藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham was born about 1197, in Ixworth, Suffolk, England, his father, Stephen le Blount, was 32 and his mother, Maria Blount, was 28. He married Cecilia Levet about 1220, in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He died about 1288, in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England, at the age of 93, and was buried in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham est né environ 1197, à Ixworth, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Stephen le Blount, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Maria Blount, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Levet environ 1220, à Saxlingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé environ 1288, à Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 93 ans, et a été enterré à Belton In Rutland, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat um 1220 in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Cecilia Levet geheiratet. Er starb um 1288 im Alter von 93 Jahren in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England und wurde in Belton In Rutland, Rutland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Cecilia Levet circa 1220, nel Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. ja.lifeSummary: Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlinghamが約1197年にイギリススフォルクイクスウオルスで生まれた時，父Stephen le Blountは32歳，母Maria Blountは28歳であった。約1220年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクサクスリンガムでCecilia Levetと結婚した。彼は約1288年にイギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランドで93歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスルトランドベルトン イン ルトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham(이)가 대략 1197년 영국 수폴크 이스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Stephen le Blount(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Blount(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 사스링함에서 Cecilia Levet(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 대략 1288년 영국 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드에서 93세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 벨턴 인 루틀랜드에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Cecilia Levet aproximadamente 1220, em Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Blount 2nd Baron Saxlingham родился около 1197 г. в местности иксворт, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Stephen le Blount было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Blount, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Levet около 1220 г. в местности сакслингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер около 1288 г. в местности белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия в возрасте 93 лет и был похоронен в местности белтон ин рутланд, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания.
